text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you've made up your mind? "Dear 
Tachyon, in celebration of your birthday, 
I'll be your test subject for the day"… No?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…I knew you'd react like this. 
Just be quiet for once and take 
your present…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahaha! Not only can you see the 
unseen, but you've developed a sense
of precognition now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm-hmm. The occidental lobe of the brain processes visual information, while the prefrontal cortex works to visualize things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Those areas of your brain may be more 
developed than in that of others.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…The world I see is a "cognitive illusion"? 
Is that…… what you're trying to say?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, it simply means that you have a 
remarkable brain able to perceive phenomena
that are difficult to prove scientifically!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you curious about your brain too!? 
Then let's start with a simple brain fluid test! 
I'll grab the electrode plates and respirator!!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…No thanks. Also, I forgot 
to mention something.
